name: Blitz Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Cream butter with 1/2 cup of sugar until smooth and fluffy.
3. Add vanilla, then egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add the flour mixture and Half & Half, stirring well after each addition.
5. Spread batter evenly in two 8-inch layer pans with greased bottoms lined with thin plain paper.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
8. Quickly spread the beaten whites over the baked cakes and sprinkle sliced almonds on top.
9. Return to the oven for an additional 15 minutes (or until the meringue is richly browned).
10. Cool thoroughly in pans on cake racks.
11. Remove from pans carefully.
12. Place one layer with the meringue side down on a plate.
13. Spread with lemon filling and top with the remaining layer, also with the meringue side up.
